memo: PGPD logged 255 crime reports in the 7 days ending Jul. 11, down 23% from the week before. Year to date: 8628, vs. 10069 at this point last year.
The past week breaks down to 66 violent and 189 property crime reports.
Year to date — murders: 23 (down 36% vs. 2025); carjackings: 33 (down 60% vs. 2025); non-fatal shootings: 67 (down 35% vs. 2025).
No homicides reported in the past 7 days.
caveats: Figures cover crimes reported within PGPD's primary jurisdiction; municipal police departments (Laurel, Bowie, Greenbelt, Hyattsville and others) are not included.
Data is subject to change as incidents are investigated and reclassified.
PGPD's categories differ from FBI UCR definitions.
